s1Body:
Welcome to EKORU, a digital platform designed to promote the circular economy through the buying, selling, and exchanging of products, access to sustainable services, and participation in an active community with environmental impact.

These Terms and Conditions govern access to, use of, and operation of the EKORU platform. By registering, accessing, or using any functionality, you declare that you have read, understood, and fully accepted these terms.

Using EKORU constitutes a binding contractual relationship between the user and the platform. If you disagree with any of the points set forth herein, you must refrain from using our services. EKORU may update these terms at any time to adapt to technological, legal, or strategic changes, and it is the user's responsibility to review them periodically.
s2Intro: For the purposes of these Terms and Conditions, the following terms shall be understood as:
s2Platform: Platform: The set of digital services offered by EKORU, including the mobile application, website, and associated systems.
s2User: User: Any natural or legal person who accesses, browses, or uses EKORU, with or without registration.
s2Content: Content: All information generated or shared by the user, including texts, images, publications, data, products, and messages.
s2Services: Services: Functionalities offered by EKORU, such as marketplace, digital barter, community, recycling, repair, and others.
s2Data: Data: Information collected from user interactions with the platform.
s2Footer: These definitions aim to clearly delineate roles and scopes within the EKORU ecosystem, allowing for a consistent interpretation of these terms across all contexts of use.
s3Body:
The user agrees to use EKORU in a responsible, ethical, and lawful manner. This includes, among other things, providing truthful information, maintaining respectful behavior, and refraining from unlawful or fraudulent activities.

Users may not use the platform to disseminate offensive, misleading, illegal, or third-party rights-infringing content. EKORU promotes a community based on trust, collaboration, and respect, and any conduct that undermines these principles may be penalized.

EKORU reserves the right to monitor activity on the platform and to suspend, limit, or delete accounts when it detects violations, suspicious behavior, or risks to the community, without prior notice.
s4Body:
The user is solely responsible for the content they publish on EKORU and warrants that they hold the necessary rights to share it. This includes responsibility for the accuracy of information, the legality of content, and respect for third parties.

By publishing content, the user grants EKORU a broad, non-exclusive, royalty-free, worldwide, and transferable license to use such content in the operation, improvement, and promotion of the platform. This includes the ability to reproduce, adapt, distribute, and publicly communicate it.

This license enables EKORU to operate efficiently, display content within the community, create personalized experiences, and develop growth strategies, always respecting the established privacy principles.
s5Intro: The user acknowledges and agrees that EKORU collects and processes information derived from their use of the platform, with the aim of improving the service, optimizing the experience, and developing new features.
s51Body:
EKORU may collect various types of information, including personal data, usage data, browsing behavior, product interactions, and activity within the platform. This collection may occur directly (information provided by the user) or automatically (through digital technologies).

This information is essential for the proper functioning of the platform, personalization of the experience, and value generation for both users and the EKORU ecosystem.
s52Body:
The collected data will be used for multiple purposes, including improving the user experience, optimizing the interface, personalizing recommendations, developing new features, and understanding behavioral patterns.

EKORU may use this information to continuously improve its services, facilitating more relevant connections between users, products, and services within the circular ecosystem.
s53Body:
EKORU may process, analyze, and transform the collected information into metrics, reports, and indicators that help understand trends, behaviors, and dynamics within the platform.

This data may be aggregated and anonymized to ensure user privacy, generating valuable information about consumption habits, reuse, and sustainability.
s54Body:
EKORU may commercialize information derived from the platform, always in aggregated, statistical, and anonymized format, without identifying individual users.

This includes the possibility of sharing insights, trends, and analyses with companies, institutions, organizations, or public and private entities interested in understanding sustainable consumption behavior.

Under no circumstances will EKORU sell personally identifiable information without the user's explicit consent, maintaining the protection of privacy as a top priority.
s55Body:
The generated data may be used for the development of intelligent systems, recommendation algorithms, predictive analytics, and tools that improve the efficiency of the EKORU ecosystem.

This includes the use of data analysis and machine learning technologies to anticipate needs, optimize processes, and enhance the positive impact of the platform.
s6Body:
EKORU is committed to protecting users' personal information through appropriate technical and organizational security measures. This includes safeguarding data against unauthorized access, loss, or misuse.

Information will be processed in accordance with applicable data protection regulations, ensuring transparency in its use and respect for users' rights. For more details, we recommend reviewing the Privacy Policy associated with the platform.
s7Body:
EKORU acts as an intermediary platform that facilitates connections between users but does not directly participate in transactions conducted between them.

Therefore, EKORU does not guarantee the quality, condition, or legality of products, nor is it responsible for breaches, disputes, or damages arising from transactions. Users are advised to exercise caution, verify information, and maintain good security practices.
s8Body:
All intellectual property rights related to EKORU, including its name, brand, design, software, content, and features, are the exclusive property of the platform or their respective owners.

Users may not copy, reproduce, distribute, or use these elements without prior authorization. Improper use may result in corresponding legal action.
s9Body:
EKORU shall not be liable for direct or indirect damages arising from the use of the platform, including economic losses, service interruptions, or third-party actions.

The platform is provided "as is", without absolute guarantees of continuous or error-free operation, although reasonable efforts will be made to maintain its operability and quality.
s10Body:
EKORU may modify these Terms and Conditions at any time to adapt to changes in legislation, technology, or business model.

Modifications will be communicated through the platform and will take effect from the date of publication. Continued use of the service will imply acceptance of such changes.
s11Body:
EKORU may suspend or delete accounts of users who violate these terms, engage in suspicious activity, or pose risks to the community.

Likewise, users may stop using the platform at any time, without prejudice to previously acquired obligations.
s12Body: These Terms and Conditions shall be governed by the laws of the Republic of Chile. Any dispute shall be submitted to the jurisdiction of the competent courts of the country.
